# Olelbis Holdings

## Biography

Olelbis Holdings is a local faction headquartered at Polyakov Orbital in the Olelbis system, known for using trade initiatives and community events to strengthen its economic position. In November 3304, the organisation announced an elaborate social function and placed open orders for Deuringas Truffles, Mokojing Beast Feast and Mulachi Giant Fungus, promising rewards to pilots who delivered the rare commodities.

The campaign concluded successfully within a week, with hundreds of pilots supporting the initiative by delivering goods and eliminating agitators to ensure trader safety. The event reinforced Olelbis Holdings' ability to mobilise independent pilot networks for both economic and social purposes.
